title: Wicked EBay Item
wikitext:
[]: Wicked EBay Item             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jan 15, 2008 12:47 am The link doesn't distort the screen if you do it this way -Reichu Oh man.....that is BEE-u-tifull! Alas, I can't afford it on my measly salary AND afford school and my films. This recent animation piece is a bitch alongside my live action stuff but I gotta get it festival ready.... but sigh.....if I had more cash.......look at that thing......fuck me....thats nice.

[]:             Quote Post by wut_is_a_eva_lol » Tue Jan 15, 2008 2:10 am Nice...that's probably one of my favorite shots out of the whole movie (or series for that matter). The animation is fluid and the artwork...well, just look at the link. Dumb question: how big is an actual cel? Also, http://tinyurl.com/ can be handy for posting long urls like that.

[]:             Quote Post by nr4mg » Tue Jan 15, 2008 10:20 am Yah that is really cool but at that price almost no normal person can afford it. I think after i get the lastest NGE Angelic Days I'll start saving for The End of Evangelion DVD, Ive already seen it somehow 8).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jan 15, 2008 10:33 am Wasn't End of Evangelion digitally painted?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Tue Jan 15, 2008 1:40 pm They wouldn't have needed a costly restoration process that was only half-successful if it was entirely done in digital. I think '97 was right about at the end-phase of widespread cel usage.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jan 15, 2008 2:23 pm Zugzwang wrote: Wasn't End of Evangelion digitally painted?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jan 15, 2008 2:33 pm FLCL was GAINAX's first digitally painted show. I did, however, think that none of the actual cells for the show remained and that GAINAX only sold duplication cells. I'm not sure if that applies for the movie, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 15, 2008 3:12 pm BrikHaus wrote: Zugzwang wrote: Wasn't End of Evangelion digitally painted?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jan 15, 2008 3:15 pm Ornette wrote: Although I don't have the source handy, Fujifilm stopped producing cells around that time, and cells made by other companies weren't good enough to stack that many on top of each other. Therefore, studios moved to animating on computers. I'm sure some studios still hand draw, then scan in, but the move to animating on computers facilitated the move to draw everything using computers.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 15, 2008 7:24 pm IIRC, Fujifilm stopped its cel production around 2002, the year after Noir.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Jan 15, 2008 8:27 pm The current bid price strikes me as way too low, given the $1,000+ price tags I've seen on similar cels from that scene at conventions. Curious to see how high it goes. Also, don't use TinyURL. Just use the URL tag properly, like so: [code:1] [url=http://www.myreallylongurl.com]Link Text[/url] [/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Wed Jan 16, 2008 11:55 am drinian wrote: The current bid price strikes me as way too low, given the $1,000+ price tags I've seen on similar cels from that scene at conventions. Curious to see how high it goes. Also, don't use TinyURL. Just use the URL tag properly, like so: [code:1] [url=http://www.myreallylongurl.com]Link Text[/url] [/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jan 16, 2008 12:16 pm Wonder if I should get that... I have no other NGE merchandise... at all. And I'm a nut for really collectible stuff. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2008 12:38 pm Whoa, duuuuuude, GNR has nipples on her butt...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 16, 2008 2:44 pm BrikHaus wrote: Nope. I believe that digital painting didn't really get widespread until after 2000.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 16, 2008 3:50 pm Reichu wrote: Whoa, duuuuuude, GNR has nipples on her butt...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2008 4:23 pm NAveryW wrote: I fail to see buttnipples.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 16, 2008 4:44 pm Huh? Rei has a perfectly smooth delicious wonderful glorious butt in the attached picture. What tu torquking about? I feel like I'm not getting something. I wouldn't buy a picture of Rei covered in blood with her head tearing off and stuff to begin with, even if it is The Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2008 5:15 pm Ohhhh , I see now, those are just the paint strokes. Silly me......

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 16, 2008 8:20 pm That's about the level where the rest of her body is underwater/LCL/tang. Nipples on her butt, jeez!
summary: []: Wicked EBay Item             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jan 15, 2008 12:47 am The link doesn't distort the screen if you do it this way -Reichu Oh man.....that is BEE-u-tifull! Alas, I can't afford it on my measly salary AND afford school and my films. This recent animation piece is a bitch alongside my live action stuff but I gotta get it festival ready.... but sigh.....if I had more cash.......look at that thing......fuck
